hero.title2: wish existed before our visa rejections.
hero.subtitle: VisaClear is built by Vericore, a compliance and immigration technology company. We started because too many good applicants were being rejected over missing or incorrect documents that no one had clearly explained to them.

mission.title: Democratise access to accurate immigration information
mission.p1: For too long, applicants from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, India, and similar countries have been forced to rely on expensive agents or vague advice just to understand what documents to prepare.
mission.p2: VisaClear gives every applicant a precise, personalised checklist in 60 seconds. No agent required. No guessing. Just clarity.
values.v1.title: Compliance First
values.v1.desc: We build on top of GDPR and NDPA frameworks. Privacy and data protection are not afterthoughts — they are foundations.
values.v2.title: Precision Over Volume
values.v2.desc: We would rather give one applicant exactly the right documents than give ten applicants a generic guess.
values.v3.title: Built for the Overlooked
values.v3.desc: Most visa tools are built for Western applicants. We built VisaClear specifically for African, Asian, and LatAm applicants who deserve better.
values.v4.title: Continuously Updated
values.v4.desc: Visa requirements change constantly. Our team reviews and updates destination data regularly to keep checklists accurate.
why.title: Why Applicants Choose VisaClear
why.w1.headline: Built for the questions embassies actually ask
why.w1.text: Every checklist is mapped to real document categories per destination and visa type — not a generic list copied from a government PDF.
why.w2.headline: No more guessing what "proof of funds" means
why.w2.text: Each requirement comes with a plain-English explanation of what officers are actually checking for, so you submit the right evidence the first time.
why.w3.headline: From rejection letter to a real plan in minutes
why.w3.text: Upload a refusal letter and our AI breaks down exactly what went wrong and what to fix before you reapply.
team.title: Who builds VisaClear
team.name: Luca Olushoga
team.role: Founder · CISA · MSc International Relations, Business & Security
team.desc: Luca holds a Bachelor in International Relations and Social Science and a Masters in International Relations, Business and Security, and is a CISA-certified information security professional. He built VisaClear after going through the visa process himself — twice — and experiencing first-hand how broken and opaque it was for applicants who didn't have the right support.
team.desc2: For a long time, I was genuinely searching for what I was supposed to be doing with my life. That search kept coming back to one thing: I wanted to help people — not in a vague, aspirational way, but in a direct, concrete way that actually made a difference. That desire is what eventually led me into security. Understanding how systems work, where they fail, and how to build them properly felt like the first real purpose I had found. CISA was the outcome of that journey. VisaClear is the other side of it — the same instinct, applied somewhere people were clearly being failed.
compliance.title: Built with compliance at the core
compliance.c1.title: GDPR-Aligned
compliance.c1.desc: Built around European data protection principles for UK and EU applicants.
compliance.c2.title: NDPA-Aligned
compliance.c2.desc: Built around Nigeria Data Protection Act principles for all Nigerian users and partners.
compliance.c3.title: Verified Disclaimer
compliance.c3.desc: All checklists include a live-data disclaimer so users always verify with official embassy sources.
